entry.title: Candid, Episode #24: Travel (Instagram) Stories
entry.content: With Josh unable to join us this week, Marius and I catch up on the news, and then I share some of the many things I learned during my recent trip to Lisbon, including my impressions on the Sony Zeiss FE 16-35mm F4 lens. Along the way, we also answer a listener question, chastise Zenfolio for terrible behavior, discuss photo backups for travel, and I get to make my first-ever baseball reference on the show.

entry.title: Candid, Episode #23: Expose to Whatever
entry.content: This week we’ve got a couple of excellent listener questions to answer before delving into exposure. We go over ETTR and other techniques and compare exposure rules in digital versus analog photography. I had a lot of fun recording this one.

entry.title: Candid, Episode #22: Right Place, Wrong Lens
entry.content: With Josh and Marius back from their respective summer trips, we’re all back together and eager to talk about the latest photo news as well as reflections on travel equipment. This was a fun one.

entry.title: Candid Conversations: Drew Coffman
entry.content: With Josh still away, Marius & I are joined by friend of the show Drew Coffman. We talk about Drew’s gear, including a new Leica Q, before wrapping up with a detailed discussion of iPad Pro and mobile photography workflows.

entry.title: Candid, Episode #20: Photokina Predictions
entry.content: This week, with Josh still on vacation, Marius & I chat about Siri image search concerns, more WWDC details, and what we can expect to see in the camera market over the next year.
